_version: 3 (2026-07-19: killed unverifiable claims; added subject_line_spintax; per Phase 3 research + panel-pass)
_changelog: v2 (Phase 2, 2026-07-14): added give_first / who_am_i / offer / cta_time_proposals per variant; applies Nick Saraev's 4-step + 7-principle framework end to end

v3 (2026-07-19): killed variant-B 48k/32-inbox/$1m/$200k claims (unverifiable, would break trust on discovery call); reworded positioning; added subject_line_spintax (Instantly {{RANDOM|...}} syntax) per Phase 3 research recommending spintax subjects-only + full-variant body rotation

voice.tone: confident, concrete, second-person, one-to-one text-message frame — never corporate. Sound like a friend who knows their business.
voice.text_message_test: would a friend reading this over your shoulder think it's personal, or a mass send? Optimize for personal.

tech_to_outcome.RAG / vector search: instant, accurate answers pulled from your own docs — no one digging through PDFs
tech_to_outcome.agents / multi-agent: work that runs itself, 24/7, without another hire
tech_to_outcome.cold-email engine: a machine that books qualified meetings while you sleep
tech_to_outcome.voice AI (Vapi/Retell): every inbound call answered and qualified — at 3am, on a Sunday
tech_to_outcome.n8n / Modal automation: 100 manual hours a week your team does by hand — gone
tech_to_outcome.<30-day ship cycle: live this month, not next quarter
tech_to_outcome.full-stack / mobile: a real product in your users' hands in weeks
tech_to_outcome.Built with Claude Code: one senior operator moving at the speed of a whole team

nick_framework_rules.structure_4_step: personalization -> who am I -> offer -> CTA (all four, no exceptions)
nick_framework_rules.psychology_7_principles: give first, micro-commitments, social proof, authority, rapport, scarcity, shared identity — hit at least 5 of 7
nick_framework_rules.offer_master_sentence: I will do X thing for you in Y time or Z risk mitigation
nick_framework_rules.cta_doctrine: one action, two specific times, minimize steps to yes

opener_constraints._max_words_reasoning: Nick's rule = personalization is ≤2 sentences, 1 ideal (video timestamp 35:22+, chunk1). Two-sentence observations run 18-25 words. Phase-1 cap of 15 was under Nick's floor — bumped to 22 to allow Nick-style two-clause openers with an em-dash pivot.
opener_constraints.must_reference: one specific fact about the prospect derived from lead.notes or research signal
opener_constraints.must_be: an observation that signals research, not a pitch
opener_constraints.casing_preference: lowercase or sentence-case; never Title Case or ALL CAPS

subject_constraints.must_be: a question or specific-outcome or curiosity hook — never a pitch

subject_line_spintax._note: Instantly-native {{RANDOM | ... | ... }} syntax. Rotates per-send at the campaign level. Skips a Gemini call per subject. Fallback chain uses {{firstName | there}} for missing personalization variables.
subject_line_spintax.en: {{RANDOM | {{firstName | there}} — one question | one thought for {{companyName | you}} | worth a look, {{firstName | there}}? | 90 seconds of your time? | one idea for {{companyName | you}} | small win at {{companyName | your team}} | curious about {{firstName | one thing}} | one quick note | 2 minutes? | idea for {{companyName | your roadmap}} }}
subject_line_spintax.fr: {{RANDOM | {{firstName | vous}} — une question | une idée pour {{companyName | vous}} | 90 secondes de votre temps ? | une piste pour {{companyName | vous}} | curieux — {{firstName | une chose}} | un petit mot | 2 minutes ? | une question pour {{firstName | vous}} | une réflexion pour {{companyName | vous}} | une idée rapide pour {{companyName | votre équipe}} }}

give_first_constraints.must_be_concrete: a specific observation, spotted gap, insight, credit, or sample — never 'value' or 'thoughts'
must_not_be: a request for feedback disguised as a gift
a request to jump on a call

who_am_i_constraints.must_lead_with: who I've worked with + past quantified result — NOT what I do

offer_constraints.shape: outcome (quantified) + time (specific) + risk-mitigation (guarantee / free / no strings)

cta_constraints.must_propose: two specific times AND a fallback path (reply-with-time or cal.com link)

follow_up._doctrine: Start with 2-email sequence. Human ping, not case study. Rotate subject on F2.
follow_up.f2_template: Hey {first_name}, checking in on {topic}. TLDR — if this is the first time you're seeing this: {restated_body}. Thanks, Debanjan
f2_human_pings: Hey {first_name}, are you cool man? Get back to me when you can.
Hey {first_name}, just checking in on {topic}. Let me know.
Hey {first_name}, let me know if this got lost.
Hey {first_name}, quick ping on the ai piece we discussed.
follow_up.expansion_trigger: reply rate on 2-step over baseline before adding F3

signature._note: 15% of emails should have one deliberate small imperfection at the END — a lowercase word, an abbreviation, a missing period — per Nick's humanization doctrine. Never at the start.

email_length_target._note: Nick's rewrites in the source video average 90-130 words. Under 65 is too thin to establish trust. Over 130 loses attention past the offer.
